created_for: M3 CSV/JSON unknown-structure profiling, AI recommendation, Silver/Gold spec handoff
reason: The previous L0-L6 map overloaded L3 and L4. L3 contained evidence reduction, Silver recommendation, Gold recommendation, and approval. L4 contained deterministic Silver spec, Gold spec, compiler validation, Silver preview, and Gold preview. The expanded map separates AI recommendation, human decision, deterministic compilation, Silver preview, and Gold preview.

model_boundary.meaning: A Codex/model choice for AI recommendation generation. It is not Apache Spark execution.
must_not_do: Do not call AI per raw row in realtime data-plane.
Do not let AI write directly to production Silver or Gold tables.
Do not merge Silver cleaning readiness and Gold semantic readiness into one status.

expanded_layers.name: Raw Preservation
expanded_layers.role: Preserve raw source reference, object identity, checksum/etag, byte size, source window, and replay pointer.

expanded_layers.name: Bronze Envelope
expanded_layers.role: Wrap records in a traceable bronze envelope without losing parse failures, offsets, file/object pointers, and rescue fields.

expanded_layers.name: Profile and Schema Snapshot
expanded_layers.role: Create deterministic evidence from unknown CSV/JSON/JSONL/Parquet: type router result, schema fingerprint, field profile, null ratios, examples, sketch, and drift baseline.

actual_flow.to: M3 L3 AI input evidence pack

expanded_layers.name: AI Input Evidence Pack
expanded_layers.role: Reduce L2 evidence into a compact, bounded control-plane package for AI. This is where row-level data is explicitly cut off and profile evidence becomes the only AI input.

actual_flow.to: M3 L4 AI recommendation model slot

sub_layers.name: Metadata Retrieval Index Plan
sub_layers.role: Prepare schema/profile/column/gold-template documents and payload filters for optional vectorDB-backed control-plane retrieval.

sub_layers.name: Gold Template Candidate Retrieval
sub_layers.role: Retrieve or deterministically match top-k Gold template candidates such as gold_product_health from profile and role-hint evidence.

sub_layers.name: Candidate Grounding
sub_layers.role: Check candidate templates against exact name/type compatibility, value range needs, join overlap needs, denominator rules, PII/query exposure, preview requirement, and user approval requirement.

expanded_layers.name: AI Recommendation Draft
expanded_layers.role: Call the configured AI model, for example gpt-5.3-codex-spark if available, to draft editable Silver cleaning recommendations, general Gold semantic/model recommendations, presentation product health Gold templates, and vector/embedding handoff templates from L3 evidence only.

actual_flow.from: M3 L3 AI input evidence pack
actual_flow.to: M1/M5 L5 recommendation edit and decision

expanded_layers.name: Decision and Edit Contract
expanded_layers.role: Let the user edit, approve, reject, or request changes separately for Silver and Gold. AI output remains a draft until this layer locks a decision.

actual_flow.from: M1 user edits and M5 approval state

expanded_layers.name: Deterministic Spec Compiler
expanded_layers.role: Compile approved Silver and Gold decisions into deterministic, machine-readable Spark execution specs. This layer bans per-row AI, generated code execution, unbounded collect, and non-replayable functions.

expanded_layers.name: Silver Preview and Structural Validation
expanded_layers.role: Run or request a bounded Silver preview from the compiled Silver spec and validate schema, row counts, null rules, type conversions, masked fields, and quarantine routing.

actual_flow.to: M2 L8 Gold preview and M3 L9 quality gate

expanded_layers.name: Gold Preview and Semantic Readiness
expanded_layers.role: Run or request a bounded Gold preview from the compiled Gold spec and judge whether each Gold candidate is semantically useful, owner-reviewed, and safe for M6 query context.

actual_flow.from: M2 execution of L6 gold_generation_spec over L7 Silver

expanded_layers.name: Quality, Drift, and Quarantine Gate
expanded_layers.role: Evaluate processing quality, schema compatibility, drift, replay hash, reconciliation, PII warnings, quarantine, and policy gates across Silver and Gold outputs.

actual_flow.from: M2 L7/L8 preview metrics and M3 gate rules
actual_flow.to: M5/M6 L10 catalog and semantic handoff

expanded_layers.name: Catalog Metadata and Semantic Handoff
expanded_layers.role: Package source, profile, Silver spec, Gold metric definitions, semantic template refs, vector/embedding handoff refs, semantic catalog vector-index template refs, lineage, quality caveats, semantic hints, and SQL context into catalog metadata usable by M5 and M6.

actual_flow.from: M3 L0-L9 artifact references and gate results
actual_flow.to: M5 catalog API/storage and M6 SQL/AI query context

actual_module_flow: M1 source registration -> M3 profiling/recommendation/spec contract -> M2 Silver/Gold preview execution -> M3 quality/readiness gate -> M5 catalog storage -> M6 SQL/AI query context
m4_note: M4 is not in the current actual handoff path. Add M4 only if the team assigns it as a concrete execution/result producer.

current_to_expanded_mapping.expanded: L7 Silver Preview and Structural Validation
L8 Gold Preview and Semantic Readiness
L9 Quality, Drift, and Quarantine Gate
L10 Catalog Metadata and Semantic Handoff
